text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The Hugging Face model page at the cited URL (https://huggingface.co/Qwen/Qwen3-VL-2B-Thinking) exists and is published by the Qwen Team (Alibaba Group), matching the cited authors. This is a real model/software release, not an academic paper, so its absence from academic databases is expected. The cited year (2024) appears to be off — the model was released in 2025 — but this is a minor metadata error.
LINK: https://huggingface.co/Qwen/Qwen3-VL-2B-Thinking
